title: Doom & Gloom
description: Addon for the mod Oreganized! Adding Vigil Candles, Hollers, Sepulchers, Bone Piles and a new villager called Gravetender!
body:
![title](https://i.imgur.com/oDxIg1n.png)

![dividing line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e971bb088282e309dc65af7c943ab29919849e0f.png)

[![akliz ad](https://i.imgur.com/aD9X866.png)](https://www.akliz.net/galena)

![dividing line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e971bb088282e309dc65af7c943ab29919849e0f.png)

## 📖 About:
Doom and Gloom as a halloween addon for our mod Oreganized! It adds graveyards to villages, new villager proffesion called gravetender, mischevious spirit that causes fog to appear, sepulchers, vigil candles and more!

![dividing line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e971bb088282e309dc65af7c943ab29919849e0f.png)

# THIS MOD REQUIRES [BLUEPRINT](https://modrinth.com/mod/blueprint)

![dividing line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e971bb088282e309dc65af7c943ab29919849e0f.png)

## 🎞️ Compatibility:

[Dye Depot](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dye-depot) - Vigil Candles of 16 more colors!!

![dividing line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e971bb088282e309dc65af7c943ab29919849e0f.png)

## 👥 Where can you find us?:

We are Team Galena, we produce other mods like Windswept, Overweight Farming, Fermion, Copperative and more!
